CustomField.description: ContentDocumentId of the NEPA document this comment relates to (e.g., a Draft EIS). Stored as Text because Salesforce does not permit Lookup fields targeting ContentDocument/ContentVersion. Per CEQ standard Figure 1, comments are children of documents.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ContentDocumentId of the NEPA document (e.g., Draft EIS) this comment was submitted in response to.
CustomField.label: Related Document ID
